/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libsaye_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libsaye_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/saye_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/saye_msgs/msg/detail/map__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/saye_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/saye_msgs/srv/detail/share_map__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libnav2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
